text: a virtual prompt, a dramatic panoramic shot from a high ridge overlooking a vast,
tundra valley at dusk. In the foreground, Brennoke the Neanderthal mystic stands at the cliff edge,
his massive silhouette framed against a sky bruised purple and gray,
his mammoth-hide cloak billows and a harsh wind. His antler-crown headdress is half-shadowed,
the carved bone catching the last light. One scarred hand grips a gnawled staff,
topped with a pale crystal that pulses weekly with sickly green light.
Far below in the valley fires burn and scattered Neanderthal settlements,
but beyond them, a creeping wall of blackness advances across the land like spilled ink spreading
through water. The camera is behind Brennoke at a low angle, emphasizing his immense
frame against the encroaching dark, pellet, deep indigo, storm-gray, embers, and encroaching black.
